sql: SELECT STRAIGHT_JOIN u.id, u.name, o.id as order_id, o.amount, p.name as product_name FROM users u FORCE INDEX (idx_user_status) INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id INNER JOIN order_products op ON o.id = op.order_id INNER JOIN products p ON op.product_id = p.id WHERE p.id IN (#{productIds}) AND u.status = #{userStatus} AND o.status = #{orderStatus} AND o.amount >= #{minAmount} ORDER BY #{sortField} LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT STRAIGHT_JOIN
    u.id, u.name, o.id as order_id, o.amount, p.name as product_name
FROM users u
<if test="forceOrder == true">
    FORCE INDEX (idx_user_status)
</if>
INNER JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
<choose>
    <when test="productIds != null and productIds.size() > 0">
        INNER JOIN order_products op ON o.id = op.order_id
        INNER JOIN products p ON op.product_id = p.id
        WHERE p.id IN
        <foreach collection="productIds" item="pid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{pid}
        </foreach>
    </when>
    <otherwise>
        INNER JOIN products p ON o.product_id = p.id
    </otherwise>
</choose>
<where>
    <if test="userStatus != null">
        AND u.status = #{userStatus}
    </if>
    <if test="orderStatus != null">
        AND o.status = #{orderStatus}
    </if>
    <if test="minAmount != null">
        AND o.amount >= #{minAmount}
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
